requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing to ITU-Referenced Standards (ATRA Type Approval / ANSA Technical Assessment)
requirement_topic.zh: ITU参考标准的EMC测试（ATRA型号认证/ANSA技术评估）
requirement_topic.zht: ITU參考標準的EMC測試（ATRA型號認證/ANSA技術評估）

summary.en: ATRA type approval requires EMC and radio parameter test reports from a recognised laboratory demonstrating conformance with ITU-R recommendations or internationally accepted EMC and radio standards applicable to the device category. The Afghanistan National Standards Authority (ANSA — اداره ملی معیاری سازی افغانستان) serves as the national standards body and may be involved in technical assessment of standards references. For Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, ITU-T and ETSI EN 301 489 series standards are internationally referenced frameworks. For other radio categories (LoRa/SRD, cellular), the applicable ITU-R or ETSI sub-standards apply. EMC test evidence is submitted as part of the ATRA type approval application dossier. Chinese GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625) are not independently accepted by ATRA. Due to Afghanistan's developing regulatory infrastructure, the precise test report format and accredited laboratory list accepted by ATRA should be confirmed directly with ATRA at the time of application.
summary.zh: ATRA型号认证要求提供由经认可实验室出具的EMC及无线电参数测试报告，证明符合适用于该设备类别的ITU-R建议或国际公认EMC及无线电标准。阿富汗国家标准局（ANSA — اداره ملی معیاری سازی افغانستان）作为国家标准机构，可能参与技术标准参考的评估。对于Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，ITU-T及ETSI EN 301 489系列标准是国际参考框架。其他无线类别（LoRa/SRD、蜂窝）适用相应的ITU-R或ETSI子标准。EMC测试证据作为ATRA型号认证申请文件的一部分提交。中国GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被ATRA单独接受。鉴于阿富汗监管基础设施仍在发展中，ATRA接受的精确测试报告格式及认可实验室名单，应在申请时直接向ATRA确认。
summary.zht: ATRA型號認證要求提供由經認可實驗室出具的EMC及無線電參數測試報告，證明符合適用於該設備類別的ITU-R建議或國際公認EMC及無線電標準。阿富汗國家標準局（ANSA — اداره ملی معیاری سازی افغانستان）作為國家標準機構，可能參與技術標準參考的評估。對於Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，ITU-T及ETSI EN 301 489系列標準是國際參考框架。其他無線類別（LoRa/SRD、蜂窩）適用相應的ITU-R或ETSI子標準。EMC測試證據作為ATRA型號認證申請文件的一部分提交。中國GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625）不被ATRA單獨接受。鑑於阿富汗監管基礎設施仍在發展中，ATRA接受的精確測試報告格式及認可實驗室名單，應在申請時直接向ATRA確認。

standards_or_laws: ITU-R Radio Regulations and ITU-R Recommendations (radio parameters)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 (Common EMC requirements for radio equipment — international reference)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 (EMC for wideband data / WLAN / Bluetooth)
ANSA (Afghanistan National Standards Authority) technical assessments

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and radio equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions for ISM/IT equipment) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions). SRRC type approval includes radio parameter measurements but does not encompass the full ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC test scope. CCC certification includes EMC under GB/T 9254 for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及无线电设备的EMC合规依据GB/T 9254（ISM/IT设备的传导和辐射发射）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）执行。SRRC型号认证包含无线电参数测量，但不涵盖完整的ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC测试范围。CCC认证对列入目录的产品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及無線電設備的EMC合規依據GB/T 9254（ISM/IT設備的傳導和輻射發射）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）執行。SRRC型號認證包含無線電參數測量，但不涵蓋完整的ITU/ETSI EN 301 489 EMC測試範圍。CCC認證對列入目錄的產品按GB/T 9254包含EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (radio parameter testing, not full EMC)

gap.en: ATRA requires EMC evidence to ITU-R or ETSI EN 301 489 series standards, which differ in test methods, limits, and frequency ranges from Chinese GB/T 9254. A new EMC test campaign at an ATRA-accepted accredited laboratory is required. Existing SRRC and CCC EMC reports to GB standards cannot be reused for ATRA. The ETSI EN 301 489 framework also covers immunity testing (IEC 61000-4 series) beyond the SRRC radio parameter scope. Exporters should confirm with ATRA which specific accredited laboratories and test report formats are accepted under the current procedures, as Afghanistan's regulatory standards infrastructure may continue to evolve.
gap.zh: ATRA要求提供符合ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列标准的EMC证据，该系列在测试方法、限值和频率范围上均与中国GB/T 9254有所不同。须在ATRA认可的经认可实验室进行新的EMC测试。现有的依据GB标准出具的SRRC和CCC EMC报告不能用于ATRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架还涵盖超出SRRC无线电参数范围的抗扰度测试（IEC 61000-4系列）。出口商应向ATRA确认在当前程序下接受哪些具体经认可实验室及测试报告格式，因为阿富汗的监管标准基础设施可能持续演进。
gap.zht: ATRA要求提供符合ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列標準的EMC證據，該系列在測試方法、限值和頻率範圍上均與中國GB/T 9254有所不同。須在ATRA認可的經認可實驗室進行新的EMC測試。現有的依據GB標準出具的SRRC和CCC EMC報告不能用於ATRA。ETSI EN 301 489框架還涵蓋超出SRRC無線電參數範圍的抗擾度測試（IEC 61000-4系列）。出口商應向ATRA確認在當前程序下接受哪些具體經認可實驗室及測試報告格式，因為阿富汗的監管標準基礎設施可能持續演進。

source.publisher: ATRA — Afghanistan Telecom Regulatory Authority; ANSA — Afghanistan National Standards Authority (اداره ملی معیاری سازی افغانستان)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC testing to ITU-R or ETSI EN 301 489 series at an ATRA-accepted accredited laboratory is required as part of ATRA type approval. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC EMC test reports are not independently accepted by ATRA. Confirm accepted laboratory list and report formats directly with ATRA prior to application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在ATRA认可的经认可实验室按ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列进行EMC测试，是ATRA型号认证的必要组成部分。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC测试报告不被ATRA单独接受。申请前应直接向ATRA确认认可实验室名单及报告格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在ATRA認可的經認可實驗室按ITU-R或ETSI EN 301 489系列進行EMC測試，是ATRA型號認證的必要組成部分。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC EMC測試報告不被ATRA單獨接受。申請前應直接向ATRA確認認可實驗室名單及報告格式。

requirement_topic.zh: 达里语及普什图语标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: 達里語及普什圖語標籤要求

summary.en: Product labelling and user documentation in Dari (دری) and/or Pashto (پښتو) is preferred and may be required for consumer wireless devices sold in Afghanistan. Both Dari and Pashto are official languages of Afghanistan. Labels must include the ATRA approval number, model designation, power specifications (voltage and frequency: 220 V / 50 Hz), manufacturer name and country of origin, and authorized importer contact information. Packaging and user manuals in English-only or Chinese-only are generally not suitable for consumer retail distribution in Afghanistan. ANSA (Afghanistan National Standards Authority) may set labelling standard requirements for regulated products. The specific mandatory language requirement should be confirmed with ATRA and ANSA at the time of product registration.
summary.zh: 在阿富汗销售的消费类无线设备，其产品标签和用户文件优先使用达里语（دری）和/或普什图语（پښتو），并可能为强制要求。达里语和普什图语均为阿富汗官方语言。标签须包含ATRA认证编号、型号名称、电源规格（电压和频率：220V/50Hz）、制造商名称及原产国，以及授权进口商联系信息。仅英语或仅中文的包装和用户手册通常不适合在阿富汗消费零售渠道分销。ANSA（阿富汗国家标准局）可能就受监管产品的标签标准要求进行规定。具体的强制语言要求应在产品注册时直接向ATRA及ANSA确认。
summary.zht: 在阿富汗銷售的消費類無線設備，其產品標籤和用戶文件優先使用達里語（دری）和/或普什圖語（پښتو），並可能為強制要求。達里語和普什圖語均為阿富汗官方語言。標籤須包含ATRA認證編號、型號名稱、電源規格（電壓和頻率：220V/50Hz）、製造商名稱及原產國，以及授權進口商聯繫信息。僅英語或僅中文的包裝和用戶手冊通常不適合在阿富汗消費零售通路分銷。ANSA（阿富汗國家標準局）可能就受監管產品的標籤標準要求進行規定。具體的強制語言要求應在產品登記時直接向ATRA及ANSA確認。

standards_or_laws: Afghanistan Telecommunications Law 2012 — labelling requirements for approved equipment
ATRA type approval label requirements (approval number display)

summary.en: In China, product labels must include Chinese-language descriptions of product name, model, power ratings, manufacturer name, country of origin, and CCC mark (where applicable). Mandatory Chinese labelling is enforced by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation) under the Law on the Protection of Consumer Rights and Interests.
summary.zh: 在中国，产品标签须以中文标注产品名称、型号、额定功率、制造商名称、原产国及CCC标志（如适用）。国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）依据《消费者权益保护法》执行强制性中文标签要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，產品標籤須以中文標注產品名稱、型號、額定功率、製造商名稱、原產國及CCC標誌（如適用）。國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）依據《消費者權益保護法》執行強制性中文標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: China Law on the Protection of Consumer Rights and Interests

gap.en: Chinese-language-only or English-only labels do not satisfy Afghanistan labelling preferences. Dari and/or Pashto language labels must be produced for the Afghanistan market, incorporating the ATRA approval number and Afghan importer contact details. English-only or Chinese-only user manuals are generally insufficient for consumer retail distribution in Afghanistan. Confirm exact mandatory language requirements with ATRA and ANSA at the time of product registration application.
gap.zh: 仅中文或仅英文标签不满足阿富汗标签偏好要求。须为阿富汗市场制作达里语和/或普什图语标签，并注明ATRA认证编号及阿富汗进口商联系方式。仅英语或仅中文的用户手册通常不足以在阿富汗消费零售渠道分销。须在产品注册申请时向ATRA及ANSA确认确切的强制语言要求。
gap.zht: 僅中文或僅英文標籤不滿足阿富汗標籤偏好要求。須為阿富汗市場製作達里語和/或普什圖語標籤，並標注ATRA認證編號及阿富汗進口商聯繫信息。僅英語或僅中文的用戶手冊通常不足以在阿富汗消費零售通路分銷。須在產品登記申請時向ATRA及ANSA確認確切的強制語言要求。

source.publisher: ATRA — Afghanistan Telecom Regulatory Authority; ANSA — Afghanistan National Standards Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Dari and/or Pashto labelling and user documentation are required or strongly preferred for consumer wireless devices sold in Afghanistan. ATRA approval number and Afghan importer details must appear on labels. Chinese-only or English-only labels do not comply. Confirm exact mandatory language requirements with ATRA and ANSA during registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿富汗销售的消费类无线设备须提供达里语和/或普什图语标签和用户文件，或须满足此强烈偏好要求。标签须标注ATRA认证编号及阿富汗进口商信息。仅中文或仅英文标签不符合要求。须在注册期间向ATRA及ANSA确认确切的强制语言要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿富汗銷售的消費類無線設備須提供達里語和/或普什圖語標籤和用戶文件，或須滿足此強烈偏好要求。標籤須標注ATRA認證編號及阿富汗進口商信息。僅中文或僅英文標籤不符合要求。須在登記期間向ATRA及ANSA確認確切的強制語言要求。
